description: Screenshot of a news article headline and byline on a white background, with no added agency graphic design, seal, image, or border. A large bold black sans-serif headline reads: 'Many high school graduates don't finish college. Local unions are investing in paid apprenticeships.' Beneath it is the byline 'By Claire Partain, Staff Writer' (the writer's name in red) and the date 'Sep 3, 2025.' It is a cropped article screenshot. The tweet refers to a 'Make America Skilled Again' movement to expand apprenticeships.
notable_text: Many high school graduates don't finish college. Local unions are investing in paid apprenticeships. / By Claire Partain, Staff Writer / Sep 3, 2025
